content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.chat_reader
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/chat_reader.py (610 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Chat Reader - Reads live stream chat from Twitter/X and other platforms
Routes messages to Cosmos swarm for responses

CLASSES:
- BoundedSet: Set with maximum size that evicts oldest entries
  Methods: def add(self, item)
  Methods: def clear(self)
- ChatMessage: A single chat message from the stream
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- ChatReaderConfig: Configuration for chat reading
- TwitterChatReader: Reads live chat/replies from Twitter/X streams

Uses Twitter API v2 conversation
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: async def reply_to_tweet(self, tweet_id: str, text: str) -> bool
  Methods: def set_broadcast_tweet(self, tweet_id: str)
  Methods: def can_respond(self) -> bool
  Methods: def mark_response_sent(self)
  Methods: def on_message(self, callback: Callable[[ChatMessage], None])
  Methods: def on_priority_message(self, callback: Callable[[ChatMessage], None])
- SimulatedChatReader: Simulated chat reader for testing without live Twitter API

Generates fake chat 
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: def on_message(self, callback: Callable[[ChatMessage], None])
  Methods: def on_priority_message(self, callback: Callable[[ChatMessage], None])
  Methods: def can_respond(self) -> bool
  Methods: def mark_response_sent(self)
